SCR: Spatial Covariance Regression

Authors

Ihsan Buker

Satwik Acharyya

Installation

pip install git+https://github.com/iebuker/scr-python

Setup

import numpy as np
import torch
import scr
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from sklearn.metrics import matthews_corrcoef
import importlib.metadata

plt.style.use("seaborn-v0_8-whitegrid")

Simulate Data

scr.set_seed(123)
Y, S, info = scr.simulate_data_cov(
    N=2500,
    p=30,
    K_spatial=3,
    K_const=2,
    frac_genes_spatial=0.3,
    frac_genes_const=0.7,
    noise_var=0.5,
    grid_eps=1e-8,
    save_rng_state=False,
)

Model Fitting

Initialisation

scr.set_seed(123)
init = scr.scr_init(
    Y,
    L=7,
    K=7,
    a_delta=(2.1, 3.1),
    b_delta=1.0,
    a0=5.0,
    b0=0.50,
    nu=5.0,
    spca_center=True,
    spca_alpha=0.01,
    spca_ridge_alpha=0.01,
    device=scr.DEVICE,
    dtype=scr.DTYPE,
)

Kernel

hp = scr.pick_kernel_params(
    init, S, score_quantile=0.9, min_score=0.1, alpha_clip=(0.1, 50), eps=1e-12
)
Kmat = scr.rq_kernel(S, v2=1.0, rho=hp["rho"], alpha=hp["alpha"])

CAVI

scr.set_seed(123)
fit = scr.cavi(
    torch.as_tensor(Y, device=scr.DEVICE, dtype=scr.DTYPE),
    torch.as_tensor(Kmat, device=scr.DEVICE, dtype=scr.DTYPE),
    init,
    max_iter=60,
    verbose=False,
    m=128,
)

Convergence

trace = fit["trace"]
plt.plot(trace["L2_rel"])
plt.xlabel("Iteration")
plt.ylabel("Relative L2 change")
plt.title("CAVI Convergence")
plt.show()

Posterior Summaries

params = fit["params"]
mu_Theta = scr.to_numpy(params["mu_Theta"])
mu_Xi = scr.to_numpy(params["mu_Xi"])
var_Xi = scr.to_numpy(params["var_Xi"])
sigma2 = scr.to_numpy(params["b_sigma"]) / (scr.to_numpy(params["a_sigma"]) - 1)
Sigma_Theta = scr.to_numpy(params["Sigma_Theta_list"])

Covariance Estimation

Reconstruct Posterior Covariance

Sigma_true = info["Sigma_array"]
N, G, _ = Sigma_true.shape

Sigma_est = np.empty_like(Sigma_true)
diag_sigma = np.diag(sigma2)

for i in range(N):
    A_i = mu_Xi[i] @ mu_Xi[i].T + np.diag(var_Xi[i].sum(axis=1))
    diag_corr = np.einsum("kl,gkl->g", A_i, Sigma_Theta)
    Sigma_est[i] = mu_Theta @ A_i @ mu_Theta.T + np.diag(diag_corr) + diag_sigma

Convert to Correlation

Corr_est = np.array([scr.cov2cor(C) for C in Sigma_est])
Corr_true = np.array([scr.cov2cor(C) for C in Sigma_true])

RV Coefficient

rv = np.array([scr.rv_coefficient(Corr_true[i], Corr_est[i]) for i in range(N)])

print(
    f"mean={np.mean(rv):.3f}, median={np.median(rv):.3f}, "
    f"min={np.min(rv):.3f}, max={np.max(rv):.3f}"
)

plt.hist(rv, bins=20, edgecolor="black", color="grey")
plt.xlabel("RV coefficient")
plt.ylabel("Count")
plt.title("Distribution of per-spot RV coefficients")
plt.show()
mean=0.994, median=0.995, min=0.946, max=0.999

Spatial Correlation Fields

def otsu_threshold(x):
    x = np.asarray(x, dtype=float).ravel()
    x = x[np.isfinite(x)]
    if x.size < 2:
        return float("nan")
    lo, hi = float(x.min()), float(x.max())
    if lo == hi:
        return lo
    edges = np.linspace(lo, hi, 257)
    counts, _ = np.histogram(x, bins=edges)
    centers = 0.5 * (edges[:-1] + edges[1:])
    p = counts.astype(float) / counts.sum()
    w0 = np.cumsum(p)
    mu_cum = np.cumsum(p * centers)
    with np.errstate(divide="ignore", invalid="ignore"):
        sigma_b = (mu_cum[-1] * w0 - mu_cum) ** 2 / (w0 * (1.0 - w0))
    sigma_b[~np.isfinite(sigma_b)] = -np.inf
    tied = np.flatnonzero(sigma_b == sigma_b.max())
    return float(centers[(tied[0] + tied[-1]) // 2])


triu_idx = np.triu_indices(G, k=1)
edge_list = list(zip(triu_idx[0], triu_idx[1]))
sd_vector = np.std(Corr_true[:, triu_idx[0], triu_idx[1]], axis=0, ddof=1)
scg_set = set(np.where(sd_vector > otsu_threshold(sd_vector))[0])

gene_pairs = np.array(edge_list)[np.random.choice(list(scg_set), size=5, replace=False)]

fig, axes = plt.subplots(
    len(gene_pairs),
    2,
    figsize=(8, 3 * len(gene_pairs)),
    constrained_layout=True,
)

for row, (g1, g2) in enumerate(gene_pairs):
    true_field = Corr_true[:, g1, g2]
    est_field = Corr_est[:, g1, g2]

    for col, (field, title) in enumerate(
        [
            (true_field, f"True — genes ({g1}, {g2})"),
            (est_field, f"Estimated — genes ({g1}, {g2})"),
        ]
    ):
        ax = axes[row, col]
        sc = ax.scatter(
            S[:, 0],
            S[:, 1],
            c=field,
            cmap="RdBu_r",
            vmin=-1.0,
            vmax=1.0,
            s=30,
            edgecolors="none",
        )
        ax.set_title(title)
        ax.set_aspect("equal")
        ax.axis("off")
        plt.colorbar(sc, ax=ax, fraction=0.046, pad=0.04)

plt.suptitle("Spatial correlation fields: truth vs estimate", fontsize=13)
plt.show()

Edge Classification

scr.set_seed(123)
results = scr.classify_edges(fit["params"], M=500, alpha=0.1)
results["scg_true"] = results.index.isin(scg_set)

Classification Metrics

y_true = results["scg_true"]
y_pred = results["scg"]

TP = ((y_pred) & (y_true)).sum()
FN = ((~y_pred) & (y_true)).sum()
TN = ((~y_pred) & (~y_true)).sum()
FP = ((y_pred) & (~y_true)).sum()

TPR = TP / (TP + FN) if (TP + FN) > 0 else np.nan
FNR = FN / (TP + FN) if (TP + FN) > 0 else np.nan
TNR = TN / (TN + FP) if (TN + FP) > 0 else np.nan
FPR = FP / (TN + FP) if (TN + FP) > 0 else np.nan
MCC = matthews_corrcoef(y_true, y_pred)

print(f"TPR={TPR:.3f}, FNR={FNR:.3f}, TNR={TNR:.3f}, FPR={FPR:.3f}, MCC={MCC:.3f}")
TPR=1.000, FNR=0.000, TNR=0.990, FPR=0.010, MCC=0.931

Session Info

for pkg in ["numpy", "torch", "scikit-learn"]:
    print(f"{pkg}: {importlib.metadata.version(pkg)}")
numpy: 2.4.6
torch: 2.12.0
scikit-learn: 1.8.0
